changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE client_inout_img ( pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, img_name VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL COMMENT '图片名称', client_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '财务主体pk', img_type CHAR(1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'O for out,I for in', create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk), INDEX client_pk (client_pk ASC)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '财务主体内外环境图片表';
CREATE TABLE client_inout_img

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, '' AS product_pk, '' AS product_model, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, '' AS receivable_comment, '' AS treat_comment, '' AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, 0 AS product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date FROM budget_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number UNION ALL SELECT A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name, C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date FROM budget_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk;
REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE product_order_name ( product_order_number VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '产品订单号', team_number VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '团号', name_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '销售名单表的pk', operate_status CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '操作状态：N未操作，Y已操作，D单地接', ticked CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '是否出票，Y,N', ticked_time VARCHAR(15) NULL COMMENT '出票时间,timestamp', ticked_user VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '出票人', ticket_cost DECIMAL(12,2) NULL COMMENT '机票费用', status CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '状态。Y正常，其他状态预留', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk), INDEX name_pk (name_pk ASC)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '产品订单游客信息';
CREATE TABLE product_order_name

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE product_order_name_flight_segment ( ticket_index INT(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '航段', ticket_date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '航班日期', ticket_number VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '航班号', from_to_time VARCHAR(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '抵离时间', add_day_flg CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '是否隔天达', from_to_city VARCHAR(50) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '城市对', from_to_airport VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '抵离机场', terminal VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '航站楼', create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, air_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL DEFAULT NULL, need_pk CHAR(22) NULL COMMENT '票务需求pk', PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '产品订单名单航段信息表';
CREATE TABLE product_order_name_flight_segment

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE product_order_name_air_need ( need_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '票务需求pk', name_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT '产品订单名单pk', create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '产品订单名单和票务需求对应表';
CREATE TABLE product_order_name_air_need

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW view_order_air_info AS SELECT A.product_order_number, A.flight_index AS info_index, A.start_day AS day_index, CONCAT(A.start_city, '-', A.end_city) AS from_to_city, B.pk AS need_pk, B.ticket_client_number, B.departure_date, A.flight_number FROM product_order_air_info A LEFT JOIN air_ticket_need B ON A.product_order_number = B.product_order_number UNION ALL SELECT B.product_order_number, A.ticket_index AS info_index, null AS day_index, A.from_to_city, B.pk AS need_pk, B.ticket_client_number, A.ticket_date AS departure_date, A.ticket_number FROM product_order_name_flight_segment A LEFT JOIN air_ticket_need B ON A.need_pk = B.pk;
ALTER VIEW view_order_air_info

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, '' AS product_pk, '' AS product_model, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, '' AS receivable_comment, A.treat_comment AS treat_comment, '' AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, 0 AS product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date FROM budget_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number UNION ALL SELECT A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name, C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date FROM budget_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk;
REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE dishonest_person ( name VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名', id VARCHAR(18) NOT NULL COMMENT '身份证号', dishonest_flg CHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '是否为失信人N否，Y是', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '失信人查询记录';
CREATE TABLE dishonest_person

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE dishonest_log ( id VARCHAR(18) NOT NULL, case_code VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '案号', reg_date VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '立案时间', publish_date VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '发布时间', sign_flg CHAR(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT '下架标识，Y已下架，N未下架', signal_rating CHAR(1) NULL COMMENT '信号等级，返回1、2、3、4、5、6、7；1为风险最高，7为风险最低', court_name VARCHAR(30) NULL COMMENT '法院名称', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk), INDEX id (id ASC)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '失信记录';
CREATE TABLE dishonest_log

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO everyone_count (count, type, pk) VALUES ('4', 'FAKE_NUMBER', '3');
INSERT INTO everyone_count

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE identity ( name VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名', id VARCHAR(18) NOT NULL COMMENT 'id', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk), INDEX id (id ASC)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '实名表';
CREATE TABLE identity

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO base_data (name, type, order_index, level, ext1, delete_flg, can_edit, pk, create_user, create_time) VALUES ('失信信息保存时长', 'DISHONEST', '1', '1', '7', 'N', 'Y', 'pk_dishonest', 'N00000', '1720072881000');
INSERT INTO base_data

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, '' AS product_pk, '' AS product_model, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, '' AS receivable_comment, A.treat_comment AS treat_comment, '' AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, 0 AS product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, E.user_name AS assistant_name FROM budget_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base E ON A.assistant_number = E.user_number UNION ALL SELECT A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name, C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date='' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, G.user_name AS assistant_name FROM budget_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk LEFT JOIN user_base G ON A.assistant_number = G.user_number;
REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW final_order_view AS select A.team_number, A.product_name, '' as product_pk, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, E.client_short_name AS client_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable AS final_receivable, F.receivable AS budget_receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.receivable_comment, A.passenger_captain, A.treat_comment, A.final_type, A.raise_money, A.raise_comment, A.reduce_money, A.reduce_comment, A.complain_money, A.complain_reason, A.complain_solution, A.status, A.voucher_file, A.sale AS sale_number, B.user_name AS sale_name, A.assistant_number, G.user_name AS assistant_name from final_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.sale = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number LEFT JOIN client E ON E.pk = C.financial_body_pk LEFT JOIN budget_non_standard_order F ON A.team_number = F.team_number LEFT JOIN user_base G ON A.assistant_number = G.user_number union all select A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name,C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, F.client_short_name AS client_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable AS final_receivable, G.receivable AS budget_receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.receivable_comment, A.passenger_captain, A.treat_comment, A.final_type, A.raise_money, A.raise_comment, A.reduce_money, A.reduce_comment, A.complain_money, A.complain_reason, A.complain_solution, A.status, A.voucher_file, A.sale AS sale_number, B.user_name AS sale_name, A.assistant_number, H.user_name AS assistant_name from final_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.sale = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk LEFT JOIN budget_standard_order G ON A.team_number = G.team_number LEFT JOIN user_base H ON A.assistant_number = H.user_number;
ALTER VIEW final_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, '' AS product_pk, '' AS product_model, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, '' AS receivable_comment, A.treat_comment AS treat_comment, '' AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date = '' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, 0 AS product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, E.user_name AS assistant_name, A.sale, F.user_name AS sale_name FROM budget_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base E ON A.assistant_number = E.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base F ON A.sale = F.user_number UNION ALL SELECT A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name, C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date = '' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, G.user_name AS assistant_name, A.sale, H.user_name AS sale_name FROM budget_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk LEFT JOIN user_base G ON A.assistant_number = G.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base H ON A.sale = H.user_number;
ALTER TABLE budget_standard_order,budget_non_standard_order

changeSet.author: simpletiny
simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW budget_order_view AS SELECT A.team_number, A.product_name, '' AS product_pk, '' AS product_model, A.client_employee_pk, C.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'N' AS standard_flg, A.product_manager AS product_manager_number, D.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment AS receivable_comment, A.treat_comment AS treat_comment, '' AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date = '' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, 0 AS product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, E.user_name AS assistant_name, A.sale, F.user_name AS sale_name, A.hotel_comment FROM budget_non_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN client_employee C ON A.client_employee_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN user_base D ON A.product_manager = D.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base E ON A.assistant_number = E.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base F ON A.sale = F.user_number UNION ALL SELECT A.team_number, IFNULL(A.product_name, C.name) AS product_name, A.product_pk, A.product_model, A.client_employee_pk, D.name AS client_employee_name, A.independent_flg, A.comment, A.other_cost_comment, A.other_cost, A.fy, A.special_cost, A.special_count, A.adult_cost, A.adult_count, A.receivable, A.days, A.departure_date, A.pk, A.update_user, A.create_user AS create_user_number, B.user_name AS create_user, A.confirm_flg, A.create_time, A.update_time, A.confirm_date, A.confirm_file, 'Y' AS standard_flg, C.product_manager AS product_manager_number, E.user_name AS product_manager, A.air_ticket_cost, A.product_cost, A.operate_flg, A.name_list, A.lock_flg, A.cancel_flg, A.name_confirm_status, A.passenger_captain, A.receivable_comment, A.treat_comment, F.client_short_name AS client_name, CASE WHEN A.departure_date = '' OR A.departure_date > NOW() THEN 'no' WHEN NOW() >= A.departure_date AND DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) > NOW() THEN 'yes' WHEN NOW() >= DATE_ADD(A.departure_date, INTERVAL A.days - 1 DAY) THEN 'back' END AS status, A.product_value, A.receivable_first_flg, A.do_confirm_date, A.assistant_number, G.user_name AS assistant_name, A.sale, H.user_name AS sale_name, A.hotel_comment FROM budget_standard_order A LEFT JOIN user_base B ON A.create_user = B.user_number LEFT JOIN product C ON A.product_pk = C.pk LEFT JOIN client_employee D ON A.client_employee_pk = D.pk LEFT JOIN user_base E ON C.product_manager = E.user_number LEFT JOIN client F ON D.financial_body_pk = F.pk LEFT JOIN user_base G ON A.assistant_number = G.user_number LEFT JOIN user_base H ON A.sale = H.user_number;
ALTER VIEW budget_order_view

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE order_supplier ADD COLUMN pick_date VARCHAR(10) NULL COMMENT '接团日期' AFTER confirm_file_templet, ADD COLUMN treat_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '接待说明' AFTER pick_date, ADD COLUMN payable_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '团款说明' AFTER treat_comment;
ALTER TABLE order_supplier

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE order_supplier_sale_order ( team_number VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '销售订单团号', receivable_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '团款备注', contact_way VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '联系方式', hotel_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '住房备注', treat_comment VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '接待备注', pick_send_info VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT '接送信息', base_pk CHAR(22) NULL COMMENT '对应order_supplier的pk', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '产品订单供应商对应销售订单表';
CREATE TABLE order_supplier_sale_order

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE order_supplier_sale_order_name_info ( name_pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL COMMENT 'sale_order_name_list的pk', price DECIMAL(12,2) NULL COMMENT '价格', base_pk CHAR(22) NULL COMMENT 'order_supplier_sale_order的pk', pk CHAR(22) NOT NULL, create_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, create_time VARCHAR(15) NULL DEFAULT NULL, update_user VARCHAR(10) NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (pk)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8 COLLATE = utf8_bin COMMENT = '产品订单供应商对应销售订单名单信息表';
CREATE TABLE order_supplier_sale_order_name_info

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE product_order_operation ADD COLUMN special_count INT(11) NULL COMMENT '特殊人数（儿童）' AFTER passenger_captain, CHANGE COLUMN people_count adult_count INT(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '成人数' ;
ALTER TABLE product_order_operation

changeSet.author: simpletiny
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE client CHANGE COLUMN client_area client_area VARCHAR(10) NULL , CHANGE COLUMN client_type client_type VARCHAR(10) NULL , CHANGE COLUMN body_name body_name VARCHAR(10) NULL ;
ALTER TABLE client
